calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paula Weaver for and with (petitioner & administrator) Dana Conklin.

The Court asked if there were additional arguments regarding the statutory fee of the administrator. Ms. Weaver stated that there was nothing about that in the notes and addressed the following: that the jewelry and personal effects were distributed in July of 2015 to the beneficiaries, that receipts were filed with the court, that a notice of proposed action was not filed, that a status report was not filed as it was a small estate, the decedent died intestate, that it took a long time to obtain an heir report, that it took a long time to have the decedent's collections appraised, that the cash in the Bank of Marin account was not accruing interest, that she spoke with a bank officer and was told that the interest rate would have been .01%, that it would have amounted to less than $60.00 and that no one is objecting. The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
